description: Legal document. A damaged bill of release, in late Andalusian or Maghrebi hand. Mentions a payment of 54 peraḥim, which generally refers to the Venetian gold ducat or its equivalents. People involved include Yosef Ibn Zimra; Yehuda; and Moshe. Some deletions and correction in the text. Faded and very cursive. AA. ASE.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
